33 SUB_REQ SUB_REQ Submission Requirement CHAR 1 0 = Default for all records prior to the submission requirement field being added to the database, 1 = Facility has right to see the data, 2 = Facility and state have rights to see the data, 3 = Facility, state, and national have rights to see the data
34 TRGTDT TARGET_DATE Target Date DATE 8 For MDS, the target date is the R4 Discharge Date for any discharge, the A4A Reentry Date for any re-entry and the A3A Assessment
